data.title: Sol Strategies Closes Darklake Labs Acquisition to Bolster Solana Privacy Tech
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Sol Strategies ( (TSE:HODL) ) has provided an announcement.

On April 14, 2026, Sol Strategies Inc. closed its acquisition of the assets of Darklake Labs Pte. Ltd., the developer of Zyga, a zero-knowledge proof system designed natively for the Solana blockchain to enable private transaction execution and mitigate front‑running and sandwich attacks. The transaction, valued at USD $1.2 million and paid through a mix of cash and 1,047,156 common shares subject to a four‑month lock‑up, also brings Darklake’s founders and core team into Sol Strategies, strengthening the company’s in‑house technology capabilities and deepening its positioning as a key player in the Solana ecosystem.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:HODL) stock is a Buy with a C$29.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Sol Strategies stock, see the TSE:HODL Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on HODL Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, HODL is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held down by sharply weakened financial performance (large losses and negative cash flow) and a technically bearish price trend. The earnings call provides partial support via improving operating traction (STKESOL adoption, staking income growth, institutional validation), but liquidity/leverage and dilution risks remain significant, and valuation offers limited support due to negative earnings.

To see Spark’s full report on HODL stock, click here.

More about Sol Strategies

Sol Strategies Inc. is a Canadian investment company focused on the Solana blockchain ecosystem, with shares listed on the CSE under HODL and NASDAQ under STKE. The firm provides strategic investments and infrastructure solutions aimed at supporting the next generation of decentralized applications built on Solana and advancing blockchain innovation in that network’s broader economy.

Average Trading Volume: 55,149

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$42.93M

data.title: Schroder UK Mid Cap Fund Tightens Free Float with New Share Buyback
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

Schroder UK Mid Cap Fund PLC GBP ( (GB:SCP) ) has shared an update.

Schroder UK Mid Cap Fund PLC has bought back 20,000 of its ordinary shares at 738 pence each to be held in treasury, continuing its use of share repurchases as a capital management tool. Following the transaction, the fund’s issued share capital stands at 36,143,690 ordinary shares, with 2,453,500 held in treasury and 33,690,190 voting rights in issue, figures investors can use to assess and report their holdings under UK disclosure rules.

The reduction in free float marginally concentrates existing shareholders’ stakes and can be supportive of net asset value per share, a key metric for closed-end funds. The updated voting rights total is particularly relevant for institutional investors monitoring regulatory thresholds and transparency obligations in the UK market.

Spark’s Take on SCP Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SCP is a Neutral.

Schroder UK Mid Cap Fund PLC receives a moderate score driven by strong valuation metrics and strategic corporate events. The financial performance shows promise with revenue growth, but volatility in EBIT and lack of cash flow data are concerns. Technical indicators suggest moderate upward momentum, although potential overbought conditions need attention.

To see Spark’s full report on SCP stock, click here.

More about Schroder UK Mid Cap Fund PLC GBP

Schroder UK Mid Cap Fund PLC is a UK-listed investment trust focused on medium-sized British companies. Managed by Schroder Investment Management, the fund provides investors with diversified exposure to the UK mid-cap equity market through a portfolio of listed ordinary shares.

data.title: TCS Launches Independent Probe and Oversight Panel Over Nashik Matter
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Tata Consultancy Services Limited ( (IN:TCS) ).

Tata Consultancy Services said its CEO and managing director, K. Krithivasan, has outlined steps the company is taking in response to a recent matter involving its Nashik unit. The company emphasized that the Nashik facility remains operational and that a staff member named in media reports did not hold any HR or leadership role.

TCS has appointed Deloitte and law firm Trilegal as independent advisors to an internal investigation led by President and COO Aarthi Subramanian. An oversight committee chaired by independent director Keki Mistry will review the findings, as TCS reiterates its zero-tolerance stance on misconduct and its cooperation with law enforcement to ensure a thorough and transparent resolution.

More about Tata Consultancy Services Limited

Tata Consultancy Services Limited is a global IT services, consulting and business solutions company headquartered in Mumbai. The firm provides software development, digital transformation, and outsourcing services to clients across industries worldwide, operating large delivery centers in India and key international markets.

Average Trading Volume: 289,511

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: 9242B INR

data.title: ICRA Assigns and Reaffirms Strong Credit Ratings for Adani Power’s Rs 69,000 Crore Facilities
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Adani Power Limited ( (IN:ADANIPOWER) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Adani Power Limited has received credit rating actions from ICRA Limited, which assigned ICRA AA/Stable and ICRA A1+ ratings to its additional term loan and non-fund-based bank guarantee facilities. The agency also reaffirmed the same ratings for the company’s existing bank facilities and issued and proposed non-convertible debentures, covering total rated facilities of Rs 69,000 crore.

These strong and reaffirmed ratings underscore lenders’ confidence in Adani Power’s credit profile and capacity to service its large debt portfolio. The move supports the company’s financial flexibility in raising and refinancing capital for its power projects, which is significant for stakeholders given its sizable role in India’s electricity generation landscape.

More about Adani Power Limited

Adani Power Limited is an Indian power generation company based in Gujarat, operating thermal power plants and supplying electricity to utilities and industrial consumers. It focuses on large-scale power generation and related infrastructure, positioning itself as a key private player in India’s energy sector.

Average Trading Volume: 2,142,112

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: 3534.9B INR

data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Marizyme ( (MRZM) ) has provided an update.

On April 9, 2026, Marizyme, Inc.’s board determined that transferring all or substantially all of the company’s assets through an assignment for the benefit of creditors was in its best interests and authorized execution of a general assignment agreement with assignee Peter Hurwitz. The company entered into this Assignment Agreement on April 14, 2026, and the assignee plans to commence the state court assignment proceeding in Palm Beach County, Florida, on or before April 17, 2026, marking a major shift in Marizyme’s operations and signaling severe financial distress with significant implications for creditors and other stakeholders.

More about Marizyme

Marizyme, Inc. is a healthcare company operating in the medical technology and life sciences sector. The firm focuses on developing and commercializing specialized therapeutic and diagnostic solutions, positioning itself within niche medical markets that rely on advanced clinical products and innovation-driven growth.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.title: Hollwin Urban Operation Service Group Sets 2025 AGM, Seeks Share Issue Mandate and Board Reappointments
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Hollwin Urban Operation Service Group Co., Ltd. Class H ( (HK:2529) ) has issued an announcement.

Hollwin Urban Operation Service Group Co., Ltd., a PRC-based urban operation services provider listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, has convened its 2025 annual general meeting to be held in Changsha on May 11, 2026. The company’s business centers on integrated urban operation services in China, serving stakeholders in the urban infrastructure and municipal services ecosystem.

At the AGM, shareholders will vote on the 2025 audited financial statements, profit distribution, annual report and the board’s work report, alongside the appointment of auditors for 2026. They will also decide on the re-appointment of all current executive, non-executive and independent non-executive directors, and on granting the board a general mandate to issue up to 20% additional shares, potentially affecting the company’s capital structure and governance continuity.

More about Hollwin Urban Operation Service Group Co., Ltd. Class H

Hollwin Urban Operation Service Group Co., Ltd. is a PRC-incorporated joint-stock company listed in Hong Kong that operates in the urban operation and services sector. The group focuses on providing integrated urban operation services in mainland China, positioning itself within the broader urban infrastructure, property-related and municipal services industry.

Average Trading Volume: 20,676

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$505.6M

data.title: NextEnergy Solar Fund flags modest NAV hit from early end to UK carbon price support
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from NextEnergy Solar Fund Limited ( (GB:NESF) ).

NextEnergy Solar Fund has responded to the UK Government’s plan to remove the Carbon Price Support tax on fossil fuels used in power generation from April 2028, a move intended to simplify the carbon pricing framework now that coal has largely exited the system and the UK Emissions Trading Scheme has matured. The company notes that CPS was already expected to diminish in relevance as renewables grow and fossil fuel plants set prices less often, but the government’s decision accelerates this trend.

The fund’s initial analysis suggests that the earlier removal of CPS will push down wholesale electricity price assumptions by about £4-5/MWh from 2028 into the early 2030s and by roughly £2-3/MWh thereafter, with a smaller effect on solar capture prices. As a result, NextEnergy Solar Fund estimates a potential reduction in its net asset value of 0.8p-1.9p per ordinary share and will provide more detailed guidance after updating its power price forecasts in its Q4 NAV and operating update due in mid-May 2026.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:NESF) stock is a Buy with a £65.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on NextEnergy Solar Fund Limited stock, see the GB:NESF Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on NESF Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, NESF is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held back by sharply deteriorating operating results (collapsing revenue and two years of net losses) and weak technical momentum (below key moving averages with negative MACD). These negatives are partly offset by strong, improving operating cash flow, a debt-free balance sheet in 2025, and a very high dividend yield, but not enough to outweigh the earnings and trend weakness.

To see Spark’s full report on NESF stock, click here.

More about NextEnergy Solar Fund Limited

NextEnergy Solar Fund Limited is a London-listed investment company focused on utility-scale solar energy and energy storage assets. Its objective is to deliver attractive risk-adjusted returns, mainly via regular dividends, from a diversified portfolio whose long-term cash flows are largely inflation-linked through UK government subsidies. As of 31 December 2025, the fund had an unaudited gross asset value of £997m and is classified as an Article 9 fund under EU sustainable finance rules, reflecting its dedicated focus on sustainable solar infrastructure.

Average Trading Volume: 2,979,708

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

See more data about NESF stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Fusen Pharmaceutical Wins China Approval for Glucosamine Osteoarthritis Capsule
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Fusen Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. ( (HK:1652) ) is now available.

Fusen Pharmaceutical has secured Chinese regulatory approval for its Glucosamine Sulfate Capsule, marketed under the Shuhuitong brand, for treating primary and secondary osteoarthritis. The product, based on natural amino monosaccharides that support cartilage matrix synthesis, is positioned to relieve joint pain, improve function, and slow disease progression in patients needing both short-term relief and long-term maintenance.

Classified as a Class B drug in the national medical insurance catalogue, Glucosamine Sulfate Capsule already represents a sizeable and fast-growing market segment, with category sales exceeding RMB850 million in 2024 and strong double-digit growth into 2025. The launch strengthens Fusen Pharmaceutical’s product pipeline in musculoskeletal care, enhances its presence in the osteoarthritis field, and taps into rising demand driven by China’s aging population and the broader Healthy China policy agenda.

More about Fusen Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.

Fusen Pharmaceutical Company Limited is a Hong Kong–listed drug maker incorporated in the Cayman Islands, operating through subsidiaries such as Henan Fusen Pharmaceutical in mainland China. The group focuses on developing and marketing prescription medicines in therapeutic areas aligned with long-term demographic trends, targeting the growing demand for chronic disease treatments in the Chinese healthcare market.

Average Trading Volume: 614,368

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: HK$882.3M
